response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on testability and modern tooling, but lacks direct alignment with the core C++ and industrial automation requirements of the role. Their background in low-latency systems and event-driven architectures is relevant, though their recent work emphasizes TypeScript/Node.js over C++.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven architectures and low-latency systems (e.g., Dunnhumby media, GISCollective).
Proven leadership in open-source projects and mentorship (e.g., workshops, Refactoring Dojos).
Strong full-stack development skills with exposure to cloud (AWS) and IoT-adjacent technologies.
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience; primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang.
No explicit mention of industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) or secure development lifecycle practices.
Diverse but fragmented career path with frequent role changes, raising questions about long-term fit.
